description: Style Note Look cool and stylish while you exercise in these track pants from nike. Wear them with a colourful tee and sports shoes for a fuss-free outfit which won't get in your way. The soft cotton fabric will wick away sweat and help you stay cool when things heat up! Also perfect for those armchair Sports fans who want something comfy to wear while lounging around at home. Product Details Regular Fit grey track pants with an elasticated waistband which fits snugly, insert pockets at sides, one back pocket and branding embroidered on front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron
